ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "primary_key" TEXT /* Primary key of the table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the table schema */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the table was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the table */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the table */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "columns" (
  "column_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each column */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table the column belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the column */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the column */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the column */,
  "nullable" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the column can contain null values */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the column */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the column was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the column */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the column */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the column */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("column_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_columns_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_columns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_columns_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* ID of the column the rule applies to */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., required, valid_email) */,
  "rule_value" TEXT /* Value of the validation rule */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Custom error message to be displayed when the validation rule fails */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the validation rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the validation rule */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the validation rule */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES columns ("column_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "column_id" INTEGER /* ID of the column the label applies to */,
  "label_text" TEXT /* Text of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the label */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the label */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_column_id FOREIGN KEY ("column_id") REFERENCES columns ("column_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
